articles.title: NASA, OPM Launch NASA Force to Recruit Top Talent for US Space Program - NASA (.gov)
articles.description: The U.S. Office of Personnel Management (OPM) and NASA announced NASA Force on Wednesday, a dedicated talent track within the US Tech Force initiative
articles.content: The U.S. Office of Personnel Management (OPM) and NASA announced NASA Force on Wednesday, a dedicated talent track within the US Tech Force initiative designed to recruit and deploy the nations top e… [+1948 chars]
